message:
refactor(missions): split MissionBrowser.tsx into focused subcomponents (#9288)

Extracts 7 subcomponents from the 1807-line MissionBrowser.tsx to make
each piece independently readable and testable:

- MissionBrowserTopBar: search input, filter toggle, view-mode, close
- MissionBrowserFilterPanel: all filter pill rows (match %, source,
  category, class, maturity, difficulty, CNCF, tags)
- MissionBrowserTabBar: tab navigation + refresh button
- MissionBrowserSidebar: file tree, inline add-repo/path forms, drop zone
- MissionBrowserRecommendedTab: recommendations, browse-on-github link,
  directory listing
- MissionBrowserInstallersTab: installer search, filters, virtualised grid
- MissionBrowserFixesTab: fixer search, type filter, virtualised grid

MissionBrowser.tsx retains all state, effects, and data-fetching; it is
now the thin orchestrator composing the above pieces. No behaviour change.

Fixes #8624

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

Presentation is split + * into focused subcomponents (issue #8624): + * - MissionBrowserTopBar — search, filter toggle, view-mode, close + * - MissionBrowserFilterPanel — filter pill rows + * - MissionBrowserTabBar — tab navigation + * -
